name: My Lawyer, Mr. Jo
overview: Jo Deul-Ho, who came from a poor family background, is a promising prosecutor, but he can't ignore the corruption at his workplace. He becomes a whistle-blower and loses everything. Jo Deul-Ho then works to become a lawyer.

trailers.title: My Lawyer, Mr. Joe | 동네변호사 조들호 [Preview - Ver.1]
